summary: Added a root custom proprietary LICENSE for Woonggon Kim.
Updated README and package.json to reference the repository license.
not_changed: No standard OSS license was applied.
risks: This is a custom proprietary license and not an OSI-approved open-source license.
If different usage rights are desired later, the text will need revision.
recommendation: Keep the root LICENSE file as the single source of truth for main branch licensing.
